zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cooke於1430年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾吉可亞頓。她於1456年與John Beaumont在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾吉可亞頓聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾吉可亞頓聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Cooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Cook  .

History: Francis Cooke (died 1663) and his eldest son John were passengers on the Mayflower in 1621; they were joined two years later by Francis's wife and other children. In the words of William Bradford, he lived long enough ‘to see his children's children have children’.

variants.name: Cook
meanings: English: occupational name for a cook, a seller of cooked meats, or a keeper of an eating house, from Middle English cok, coke, cook, couk, cuk(e) (Old English cōc) ‘cook’ or ‘seller of cooked foods’. See also Kew .
Irish and Scottish: usually identical in origin with the English name (see 1 above), but in some cases a shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cúg ‘son of Hugo’ (see McCook ).

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘cook’, such as German and Jewish Koch , Dutch Kook , Polish Kucharz and Kucharczyk , Slovenian and Croatian Kuhar , North German Kuk .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cooke was born in 1430, in Kirkheaton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. She married John Beaumont in 1456, in St John the Baptist's Church, Kirkheaton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died in her hometown, and was buried in St John the Baptist's Church, Kirkheaton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Saint John the Baptist's Church, Kirkhea: イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアキルクヒートンスト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチ

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cookeは1430年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアキルクヒートンで生まれた。1456年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアキルクヒートンスト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチでJohn Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアキルクヒートンスト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint John the Baptist's Church, Kirkhea: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 커크히턴 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cooke(은)는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 커크히턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 커크히턴 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에서 John Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 커크히턴 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Cooke родилась в 1430 г. в местности кирхитон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Beaumont в 1456 г. в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, кирхитон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, кирхитон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
